user.title: Select mode
user.description: Choose how this Home Assistant instance participates in the bridge.

data_description.role: Host mode: this instance exposes entities to remotes. Remote mode: this instance mirrors entities from a host.

host_filters.title: Filter configuration
host_filters.description: Choose which entities this host exposes to the remote instance. Exclude always overrides include.

select_host_config.title: Select host configuration
select_host_config.description: Found {count} host configuration(s) on {host}. Select which one this remote should link to.

error.unsupported_version: Unsupported Home Assistant version. At least 0.111 is required.
error.version_mismatch: Integration version mismatch between host and remote. Both instances must run the same version.
error.missing_endpoint: Remote Home-Assistant is not installed or not in host mode on that instance.

abort.no_host_configs: No host configurations were found on this instance. Make sure Remote Bridge is installed and set up in Host mode first.
abort.not_ha_bridge_host: This Home Assistant instance does not have Remote Bridge installed in host mode.

host_settings.title: Filters & Remote Access
host_settings.description: Choose which domains, devices, and entities are exposed to remote instances. Exclude always overrides include. Nothing selected = nothing exposed.

remote_settings.title: Remote Settings
remote_settings.description: Configure prefixes and service proxy settings for this remote connection.

abort.not_supported: No configuration options are supported for this entry type
